Canvas & Drawing Demo

Testing how the dark theme extension handles canvas elements. Canvas pixel content should NOT be modified by the extension.

2D Shapes

Gradient Fill

Linear and radial gradients

Chart

Data points: 6 Max: 85

Canvas & Dark Themes

Canvas elements are bitmap surfaces rendered via JavaScript. A CSS dark theme extension should NOT affect the pixel content inside canvas elements. Only the surrounding HTML elements and the canvas border/background should be darkened.

Testing Notes

The extension should: (1) Darken the page background, (2) Darken the canvas border and container, (3) NOT modify the canvas pixel content. If the canvas appears altered, that indicates a bug in the extension's element detection logic.
